_comment: Species: Restriction Origin True Body (禁制本源真身) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Restriction Origin True Body

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of living restriction 10 m, body is woven restriction-runes, shifts between patterns
canonical.size: 10 m manifestation, 0 jin (restriction); true form spans formation-networks
canonical.behavior: Restriction-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing broken restrictions; Wang Lin obtained as treasure
canonical.habitat: Restriction Mountain, ancient formation sites, restriction-aspected zones
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained restriction origin true body as treasure (canon event)
canonical.bloodline: Restriction-Dao lineage; born of accumulated restriction-power
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: restriction_origin_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
